name: Orlandi Valuta
description_short: Bakersfield, CA's Orlandi Valuta check-cashing store at Five Star Market offers fast currency exchange and check-cashing services open daily 6AM–10PM.
description_long:
Located at Five Star Market in Bakersfield, CA, Orlandi Valuta is a check-cashing and currency exchange service with convenient daily hours from 6AM to 10PM. The Bakersfield location serves both local residents and visitors who need quick access to foreign exchange and check-cashing services in the heart of the community.

At this Bakersfield Orlandi Valuta location, you can exchange currencies, cash checks, and handle wire transfers. Call +1 661-864-7770 for questions about rates, accepted documents, or to confirm current services available at the Five Star Market branch.

Bring a government-issued photo ID and your checks or currency to the Bakersfield store. Open every day from 6AM to 10PM, this location is convenient for urgent financial needs without the wait times often found at traditional banks.
address: Five Star Market, 1701 Flower St, Bakersfield, CA 93305

company_info.headquarters: Five Star Market, 1701 Flower St, Bakersfield, CA 93305

pros: Multilingual interface supporting 6 languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Vietnamese, and Mandarin Chinese
Extended operating hours at most agent locations (7-9 PM closings and weekend availability)
Integration with Western Union Rewards program for frequent users
Services available at culturally appropriate partner locations (ethnic groceries and Latino-owned businesses)
Mobile-accessible platform for tracking transfers and managing receivers online
Multiple service types at single locations (check cashing, money transfer, bill payment)
Ability to receive money directly onto prepaid cards
cons: Limited geographic coverage visible—only 7 locations shown for entire U.S. despite national website
Entirely dependent on Western Union's fee structure and exchange rates, with no independent pricing control
No information provided about specific fee amounts or competitive rate comparisons
Agent network quality inconsistent—mix of dedicated financial services and convenience retailers with varying expertise
best_for: Spanish-speaking and immigrant communities seeking familiar service locations
International money senders and receivers relying on Western Union's global network
Unbanked and underbanked individuals needing check cashing without traditional bank accounts
Multilingual customers in Colorado, New Mexico, and partner service areas
diagnosis: Orlandi Valuta is best suited for Spanish-speaking and multilingual immigrants who need reliable money transfer and check cashing services through culturally accessible agent locations rather than traditional banks. The primary caveat is that service quality and fees are entirely controlled by Western Union's corporate policies—Orlandi Valuta functions as a branded agent network without independent pricing, and geographic coverage appears significantly limited despite the national website.
services: Money transfer (send domestically and internationally via Western Union)
Cash pickup from Western Union transfers
meta_description: Bakersfield, CA's Orlandi Valuta at Five Star Market. Fast check-cashing and currency exchange, open daily 6AM–10PM.
